summary: The implementation successfully addresses all requirements from the BuildRequest. The backend provides a complete data model and methods for storing and retrieving notes, with seed data covering the required subjects. The frontend implements all three pages (home, subjects, notes) with proper navigation, breadcrumbs, and a warm educational theme. No missing requirements or hallucinated features were identified.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication integration with login/logout functionality
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly lists 'User authentication or personalized accounts' as a non-goal, but the implementation includes Internet Identity provider, useInternetIdentity hook, and authentication-related code in useActor.ts

hallucinated_features.description: Method to retrieve a single note by ID
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 specifies methods to get notes by class, subject, and both filters, but does not request a method to get individual notes by ID. The getNote(id) method was not requested
